## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Relay Financial and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is ramping up to 5 articles/week; Relay team to approve more topics](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Relay prefers in-house design for blog images; stand-in images acceptable for now](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard provides detailed performance metrics, including LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Initial content results expected within 1-2 weeks; significant impact around 2-month mark](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [Calibration blog revised with addressed comments](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [First of three new blogs for the week completed and sent for review](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Ramping up to 5 articles/week; need more approved topics from Relay team](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Balance needed across content clusters, considering keyword volume and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Blog Image Strategy

  - [GrowthX presented AI-generated featured images for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Relay prefers using in-house design team for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Agreed on using stand-in images to avoid publishing delays](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Relay to establish a process with their design team for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

### Performance Dashboard Introduction

  - [New Looker dashboard provides comprehensive analytics from GA4 and GSC](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Highlights include high engaged sessions ratio and LLM referral breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Dashboard updates in near real-time and will track GrowthX content performance](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Useful for topic ideation and tracking individual cluster performance](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### Content Performance Expectations

  - [Initial signals (impressions, clicks) typically appear within a week](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Significant impact on organic traffic and rankings expected around 2-month mark](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Content indexing monitored; manual submission if not indexed automatically](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to review and approve finalized content piece in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Relay team to drop comment in calibration blog doc when ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [GrowthX team to stage approved content on Relay's blog for final review](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Relay to work on establishing a process for blog image creation with their design team](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Continue monitoring Looker dashboard for early performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/WrPniwRivf8gu6uZyhpdm3bWytdW519f?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
